name: X's Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing first: Blend together 1/2 cup sugar, 1/2 cup vinegar, 1 cup safflower oil, 1 teaspoon mustard, and 1 teaspoon salt. Add 1 tablespoon grated onion and 1 teaspoon celery seeds; shake or beat well until combined. Chill.
2. Mix together all salad ingredients except asparagus spears in a large bowl. Pour the chilled dressing over the mixture and toss until well coated.
3. Arrange the asparagus spears on top of the salad.
4. Chill the salad well before serving, allowing it to set for at least one hour for best flavor.
